tasks.label: 📦 Install All Dependencies
tasks.command: npm install && cd cli && go mod download

tasks.label: 🏗️ Build & Package Extension...
tasks.command: bun run compile && npx vsce package --no-dependencies

tasks.label: 🚀 Deploy to code-insiders
tasks.command: bun run compile && npx vsce package --no-dependencies && VSIX=$(ls -t vscode-tmux-worktree-*.vsix | head -n 1) && code-insiders --install-extension "$VSIX" --force
